description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the monachus/hugo Docker image and defines the build and deploy stages with variables DEPLOY_HOST, DEPLOY_PATH, DEPLOY_USER, GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY, and RSYNC_OPTS. Add a build-dev job in the build stage that runs on all branches except master, executing hugo. Add a build-prod job in the build stage that runs only on the master branch, executes hugo, and publishes the generated public directory as an artifact. Add a deploy-prod job in the deploy stage that runs only on master, targets the production environment at https://guide.cdmeb.org/, and runs a series of commands: apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client git rsync -y, eval $(ssh-agent -s), echo "\$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\\r' | ssh-add - > /dev/null, mkdir -p ~/.ssh, chmod 700 ~/.ssh, ssh-keyscan $DEPLOY_HOST >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts, chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts, find public/ -type f -exec chmod 664 {} \\;, find public/ -type d -exec chmod 775 {} \\;, and rsync $RSYNC_OPTS public/ $DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST:$DEPLOY_PATH/. The pipeline does not use any caches.
